description: Get Xiaohongshu explore/discover feed notes from a specified content channel. Automatically scrolls proportionally to the requested limit to trigger lazy-load, then returns ranked notes with title, author info, engagement data (likes), cover images, and content type (image/video). Supports 11 channels including 推荐, 穿搭, 美食, 彩妆, 影视, 职场, 情感, 家居, 游戏, 旅行, 健身. Data is extracted from server-side rendered state — the command requires an active browser login. Includes human-like delays to reduce bot detection risk.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Content channel name. Valid values: 推荐, 穿搭, 美食, 彩妆, 影视, 职场, 情感, 家居, 游戏, 旅行, 健身.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of notes to return.
